contributions.notes: New optional agent: Chief Designer. 5-phase design process (understand business logic → infer user intent → walk user journey → design experience → deliver build-ready spec). Complements existing design-advisor (reviewer) and design-auditor (scanner) — this agent is the planner that produces specs before building. Battle-tested on a full settings UI migration from Discord-native to React SPA (1,347-line spec that was directly executed by engineering agents).
